tasks.description: Upgrade the Java runtime and Maven toolchain to a current supported LTS release
tasks.requirements: Update the Java version in the Maven build and verify compilation, packaging, and runtime compatibility for the desktop application.

tasks.description: Add containerization and Azure deployment readiness
tasks.requirements: Create a Dockerfile, define container-friendly runtime settings, and prepare the app for Azure Container Apps or App Service hosting.

tasks.description: Externalize database settings and plan Azure Database for MySQL migration
tasks.requirements: Move database credentials and connection properties to environment-based configuration and document the migration path to Azure Database for MySQL.

tasks.description: Replace local file-system usage with cloud-safe storage and configuration patterns
tasks.requirements: Review report and resource handling flows, move persistent data to Azure Storage or equivalent, and avoid local file dependencies in cloud deployments.

tasks.description: Remove hard-coded credentials and default passwords from code, schema, and documentation
tasks.requirements: Remove seeded default credentials, replace them with generated secrets or environment variables, and update installation guidance to avoid exposing credentials.

tasks.description: Add authentication audit logging and security events for login activity
tasks.requirements: Log successful and failed login attempts with sufficient context, without exposing secrets, and preserve a reviewable audit trail.

tasks.description: Harden file and resource path handling to prevent traversal attacks
tasks.requirements: Normalize resource paths, restrict them to approved locations, and reject traversal attempts before opening files.

tasks.description: Make shared singleton utilities thread-safe and remove unsafe synchronization patterns
tasks.requirements: Protect SessionManager and DBConnection state with proper synchronization or immutable initialization so concurrent access is safe.

tasks.description: Resolve the reported JasperReports CVE vulnerabilities
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JasperReports to a patched version that addresses the reported CVEs and verify the dependency tree is clean.
